title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 07 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 07 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 07 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 07/08/2024
DCE iron ore futures weakly throughout the day, the main contract I2501 closed 749, down 2.41% for the day. Tradersshowed a general willingness to sell, while steel mills procured at lower prices. The overall market transaction atmosphere was sluggish today.
